text:
People across Taiwan celebrated on Sunday after their men's doubles badminton team won a gold medal against Chinese opponents, a victory marked by jubilant scenes and highlighting geopolitical divides. Taiwan's Wang Chi-Lin and Lee Yang, who were the champions at the 2021 Tokyo Olympics, emerged victorious in a thrilling three-game match against China's Liang Weikeng and Wang Chang.

title: Taiwan cheers Olympics badminton triumph over China in politically charged contest - The Economic Times
description: People across Taiwan celebrated on Sunday after their men's doubles badminton team won a gold medal against Chinese opponents, a victory marked by jubilant scenes and highlighting geopolitical divides. Taiwan's Wang Chi-Lin and Lee Yang, who were the champions at the 2021 Tokyo Olympics, emerged victorious in a thrilling three-game match against China's Liang Weikeng and Wang Chang.
